scripts.build: ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro check && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build && node tools/prepare-worker-assets.mjs
scripts.deploy:preview: ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 npm run build && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs wrangler versions upload --name agentnexus-preview
scripts.deploy:production: ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 npm run build && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/logs wrangler deploy
